title: Just Beta Nether
description: Reverts the Nether completely to its original form!
body:
# **Just Beta Nether**

**Update: This mod will no longer be updated, here is a maintained but slightly different version - https://modrinth.com/datapack/legacy-nether-modrinth**

## **Description**

Don't want any of the newer minecraft nether features and content? Then this is the mod for you!, **Just Beta Nether** is a mod that aims to recreate the Nether that existed **before** the 1.16 update. This mod removes all the the newer mobs, structures, and loot tables added after 1.16. This mod is intended for people who want to revisit the old Nether Dimension of Minecraft again.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UFaQCz_GTgc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Nostalgia**

For the best nostalgic experience, I recommend using the **[Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks)** mod by **Adrenix** which includes many faithful recreations of old minecraft features alonside the **[Golden Days](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days/releases)** resource pack by **PoeticRainbow**. Additionally, using the **[Modern Beta](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-beta)** mod by **b3spectacled** brings back the old nostalgic terrain generation.

## **Beta Nether**

Want to experience the old nether while also not missing out on the newer features? Check out [Beta Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/beta-nether-2.0)

## **Support**

If you have questions or any issues with the mod, you can report them in our discord server: https://discord.com/invite/29kdKxZDCU!
